allow: PowerShell($f = "skills\\_baseline\\SKILL.md"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); $crlf = 0; $lf = 0; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 10\) { if \($i -gt 0 -and $bytes[$i-1] -eq 13\) { $crlf++ } else { $lf++ } } }; Write-Host "$f - CRLF:$crlf LF-only:$lf")
